name: Erasmus Bridge
location: Spanning the Nieuwe Maas river, Rotterdam

pylon.shape: Single asymmetric steel pylon with bent-arm kink
pylon.description: Horizontal base ~20-25m, angles up at 40-45 degrees, then straightens near-vertical

cables.arrangement: Single center plane (all attach along deck centerline)

deck.lanes: 4 car lanes, 2 tram tracks, 2 cycle paths, 2 pedestrian paths
deck.box_girders: Two spines, each 2.25m high x 1.25m wide

bascule_bridge.type: Drawbridge that lifts for tall ships

block_palette.pylon: Light blue concrete or light blue terracotta
block_palette.cables: String, chains, or light blue stained glass panes
block_palette.bascule: Iron blocks with redstone pistons for functionality
